hero.title: LED Display Rental
hero.subtitle: Flexible rental for maximum visual impact

home.feat1_desc: 650–800 nits brightness for crystal-clear visuals at indoor exhibitions and events
home.feat2_desc: Stack 1 to 3 units side-by-side to extend the visual canvas for any venue
home.feat3_desc: Optional professional setup assistance from installation through teardown

product.page_subtitle: Two high-brightness LED display models to meet every presentation need
product.single_highlight: Tall vertical format — stack side by side to form an ultra-wide display
product.triple_highlight: Self-standing triple-fold, double-sided for 360° visual coverage

simulator.title: Assembly Simulator
simulator.subtitle: Choose quantity and preview the multi-panel display effect
simulator.empty_hint: Upload an image to preview the multi-panel layout
simulator.multi_content_note: * Each panel can play different content independently for flexible display combinations

calculator.title: Price Calculator
calculator.days_hint: Include both setup and teardown days for an accurate estimate
calculator.setup_rate_hint: Half day NT${half} / Full day NT${full} (excl. tax)
calculator.note: * Estimated amount only. Final price confirmed in agreement.
calculator.include_shipping: Include Shipping (Taiwan mainland only; remote areas may incur extra charge; islands excluded)
calculator.subtitle: Get an instant estimate for your rental
calculator.contact_for_quote: Contact us for the latest quote
calculator.long_rental_warning: Rentals over 5 days are priced per project

booking.title: Book a Rental
booking.subtitle: Fill in the details and we'll confirm within 1 business day
booking.success_msg: Thank you for your booking. We will confirm the details within 1 business day.
booking.setup_persons_hint: Recommended {count} staff on-site (1–5 units: 1 person; 6–10 units: 2 people)
booking.submit_error: Submission failed. Please try again or contact us.
booking.date_required: Please select a rental date range
booking.availability_max: Maximum {max} unit(s) available for this model
booking.availability_shortage: Only {remaining} unit(s) available for this period ({qty} requested). More expected after {date}.
booking.event_date_hint: Enter your event dates — setup and teardown dates will be suggested automatically
booking.rental_date_hint: Setup date = delivery day (day before event); Teardown = pickup day (day after event). Adjust manually if your event allows same-day delivery and add a note.
booking.rental_date_note: ⚡ For same-day delivery or pickup, please note your event time in the remarks and we'll confirm.
booking.teardown_hint: Teardown after 19:00 incurs a night service fee (NT$2,000 / unit, excl. tax)
booking.teardown_night_note: Night service fee will be listed in the booking confirmation.
booking.invoice_required: Please complete all company invoice fields
booking.notes_placeholder: Describe your event, setup requirements, etc.
booking.summary_note: * Estimated amount only. Final price confirmed in agreement.
booking.summary_quote_required: Over 5 days — project-based pricing applies. We'll contact you after submission.

common.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
